prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025年物理类最低位次依次为4479→10146→5055→5095→5134名。2022年出现异常跳升后，2023–2025年稳定在5055–5134区间，近三年累计后移仅79名，走势 趋于平稳；2025年基准约5134名；本省物理类计划2021–2023年均为46人，2024年降至39人，2025年进一步降至32人；2026年计划大幅回升至45人，较202 5年扩招约40.6%，显著增加招生名额，有利于缓解竞争压力。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 211工程、双一流建设高校；软科中国大学排名2026年约第42名，近年排名稳定在44–46名区间，属 于国内顶尖财经类院校；2023年声誉评价偏负面（新闻传播学类专业投档位次下滑），但2026年周期内无明显声誉舆情事件；抖音热度排名第97位（评价一般） ，短视频平台曝光量处于中等偏下水平，未出现显著热度波动；应用经济学A、理论经济学A-，均为A类学科，在财经类院校中处于领先地位；与该校金融学类、 经济学类、财政学类等核心招生专业高度对应。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 金融/财经/经济大类2024年专业热度评估为分化观望，较2023年小幅升温，但整体仍处于推荐与劝退并存的分化状态；本省物理类考生2025年约121443人，2026年估算约145654人（按历史占比推算），考生总数增长约20%， 竞争基数扩大；中央财经大学位于北京，属于一线城市优质高校，对甘肃省考生具有较强地域吸引力。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合2026年物理类招生计划大幅扩招约40.6%、本省物理类考生增长约20%、历年位次近三年趋于平稳、学校声誉无明显负面舆情等 因素，扩招幅度显著大于考生增幅，竞争态势总体缓和，预计最低录取位次较2025年有所前移（位次数字减小）。预测最低位次约6185名，区间5685–6685名。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for Physics Category were 4479 → 10146 → 5055 → 5095 → 5134 respectively. After an abnormal jump in 2022, the rankings stabilized in the 5055–5134 range from 2023 to 2025, with a cumulative backward shift of only 79 places over the past three years, showing a stable trend; the baseline for 2025 is approximately 5134. The provincial Physics Category enrollment plan was 46 students from 2021 to 2023, dropped to 39 in 2024, and further decreased to 32 in 2025. The 2026 plan significantly rebounds to 45 students, an increase of about 40.6% compared to 2025, substantially expanding enrollment slots, which helps alleviate competitive pressure.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: A 211 Project and Double First-Class construction university; ranked approximately 42nd in the 2026 Soft Science China University Rankings, with a stable ranking in the 44–46 range in recent years, belonging to top domestic finance and economics institutions. In 2023, reputation evaluation was somewhat negative (declining application rankings for Journalism and Communication majors), but no significant reputation incidents occurred during the 2026 cycle. Douyin popularity ranking is 97th (average evaluation), with short video platform exposure at a medium-low level, showing no notable popularity fluctuations. Applied Economics is rated A, Theoretical Economics A-, both A-class disciplines, leading among finance and economics institutions. This highly corresponds to the university's core enrollment majors such as Finance, Economics, and Public Finance.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: In 2024, the popularity assessment for the Finance/Finance and Economics/Economics category was divided and wait-and-see, slightly warming compared to 2023, but overall still in a state of division between recommendation and discouragement. The number of Physics Category candidates in the province was approximately 121,443 in 2025, estimated at about 145,654 in 2026 (based on historical proportion), with a candidate growth of about 20%, expanding the competition base. Central University of Finance and Economics is located in Beijing, a first-tier city with high-quality universities, exerting strong regional appeal to Gansu candidates.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the significant expansion of the 2026 Physics Category enrollment plan by about 40.6%, the provincial Physics Category candidate growth of about 20%, the stable historical rankings over the past three years, and no significant negative reputation incidents, the expansion rate is notably larger than the candidate growth rate, leading to an overall easing of competition. The minimum admission ranking is expected to move forward (smaller ranking number) compared to 2025. The predicted minimum ranking is approximately 6185, with a range of 5685–6685.

major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_3:
Tier 3 (Relatively Easier)

- Business Administration Class (Business Administration, Marketing, etc.) (School of Business)
- Management Science and Engineering Class
- Economics and Trade Class
- Computer Class (Computer Science and Technology, Information Security, Artificial Intelligence)
- Applied Psychology (Economic Psychology)
major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: In 2026, the Physics Category enrollment plan significantly expands to 45 students, easing competition compared to previous years. For rankings within the predicted range of 5685–6685, it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 majors (Investment, Economics Class, School of Accounting Business Administration Class, Actuarial Science) as the main direction, Tier 1 majors (Financial Technology, Finance, Finance Class) as a sprint, and Tier 3 majors (Public Finance Class, School of Business Business Administration Class, Management Science and Engineering Class, Economics and Trade Class, Computer Class) as a safe backup. If the ranking is significantly better than the upper limit of the range, prioritize sprinting for Tier 1 flagship majors.

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for liberal arts/history category were 425→460→446→643→693 respectively. From 2021 to 2023, it stabilized in the 425–460 range, jumped to 643 in 2024 (+197), and further rose to 693 in 2025 (+50), with a cumulative backward shift of about 247 positions over the past two years, showing a clear backward trend; the 2025 baseline is approximately 693. The provincial liberal arts/history category enrollment plan was 18 from 2021 to 2023, increased to 25 in 2024, to 29 in 2025, and is planned to further increase to 38 in 2026, an expansion of about 31.0% compared to 2025, with three consecutive years of expansion and a significant increase in enrollment slots.

学校层次与声誉.title: School Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: A 211 Project and Double First-Class university; ranked approximately 42nd in the 2026 Soft Science China University Rankings, with stable rankings in the 44–46 range in recent years, belonging to top domestic finance and economics institutions; the 2023 reputation evaluation was somewhat negative (decline in filing rankings for Journalism and Communication majors), but no significant reputation incidents occurred in the 2026 cycle; Douyin popularity ranked 97th (average evaluation), with no notable popularity fluctuations; Applied Economics rated A, Theoretical Economics rated A-, both A-level disciplines, leading among finance and economics institutions; highly corresponding to core enrollment majors such as Finance, Economics, and Public Finance.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: The finance/finance and economics/economics major category in 2024 had a popularity evaluation of differentiated wait-and-see, slightly warming compared to 2023, but still in a state of differentiation between recommendation and discouragement; the number of history category examinees in the province in 2025 was approximately 58,374, estimated at about 73,046 in 2026 (based on historical proportion), with a total examinee growth of about 25%, expanding the competition base; Central University of Finance and Economics is located in Beijing, a first-tier city with high-quality universities, exerting strong regional appeal to Gansu examinees.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the significant expansion of the 2026 history category enrollment plan by about 31%, the growth of history category examinees in the province by about 25%, the continuous backward shift of historical rankings over the past two years, and no significant negative reputation incidents, the expansion rate slightly exceeds the examinee growth rate, leading to a generally slight easing of competition, but the inertia of the backward shift trend is strong. The predicted minimum ranking is approximately 807, with a range of 686–928.

For rankings within the predicted range of 686–928, it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 majors (Finance, Public Finance, Chinese Language and Literature, Business Administration from the School of Business) as the main direction, Tier 1 majors (Business Administration from the School of Accounting, Law, Economics) as a sprint, and Tier 3 majors (Economics and Trade, Public Administration, Sociology, Foreign Languages and Literature) as a safe backup. If the ranking is significantly better than the upper limit of the range, focus on sprinting for top-tier flagship majors.
